site.name: About Contact
site.tagline: Simple, repeatable pages for small sites

about.title: About
about.kicker: Built for clarity, consistency, and long-term ownership.
about.headline: A lightweight framework for presenting who you are and how you work.
about.lede: This section is meant to be reused across projects with only a few edits. It highlights the mission, the work you do, and the values you want to keep consistent.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Deliver reliable, maintainable work that keeps priorities clear and avoids unnecessary complexity.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Build relationships around trust, clarity, and outcomes that can be supported long after launch.

highlights.title: Rails-first approach
highlights.body: Keep the stack focused so the project stays approachable and easy to maintain.

highlights.title: Practical delivery
highlights.body: Define scope, ship iteratively, and avoid over-engineering.

highlights.title: Long-term support
highlights.body: Make decisions that keep the system stable and easy to evolve.

sections.title: What we do
sections.body: Build and support web applications, internal tools, and documentation systems.

sections.title: How we work
sections.body: Start with clear requirements, keep communication tight, and document decisions.

sections.title: What to expect
sections.body: A straightforward process, predictable delivery, and a clean handoff.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Send a note and we will respond as soon as possible.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.intro: Answers to the most common questions.

items.question: What do you need to get started?
items.answer: A clear scope, timeline expectations, and access to any existing assets.

items.question: Do you handle ongoing support?
items.answer: Yes, ongoing support can be scoped as part of the project.
